findings.description: The support-site banner in the image includes a QR code alongside the URL https://it-pass.jp. The QR code is not described in the figure caption. This is acceptable since the URL is the actionable content; no learner information is lost.

reviewer_notes: Seven entities cover all visual content on the page: brain-rest continuation, section 4 heading, body paragraph, support-site banner (URL correct), note paragraph, シラバス definition box, and IPA syllabus URL figure. zh/en translations are accurate. The QR code omission is low-severity since the URL is captured.
